what_it_does: This file is a channel attachment metadata stub that registers an image asset (pitch-deck/p-06) under the design-source channel and records when it was added.
observations: YAML frontmatter only, with no body content
target uses an image:// URI pointing to design-source/pitch-deck/p-06
added timestamp is ISO 8601 with timezone
concerns: No caption, alt text, or title for the image
Target URI cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A bare attachment stub that registers pitch-deck image p-06 in the design-source channel.
questions: What visual content does pitch-deck/p-06 contain?
Is the referenced image asset actually present and accessible?
Why is there no caption or title?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose (image attachment for design-source) matches the actual content: a metadata stub linking to an image asset.
intention_signals: It appears intended to record that a specific pitch-deck image belongs to the design-source channel so it can be located later in channel memory.
novelty: It uses an image:// URI scheme as the target reference, which is more specific than a plain file path.
contribution: A machine-readable link between a channel memory entry and an external image asset, providing a stable identifier and an addition timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record in the design-source channel that references the image asset pitch-deck/p-06 via an image:// URI and records its addition timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: It was created to catalog and link a pitch-deck image into the design-source channel memory.
